title: leontodon saxatilis var. arenarius
intro: Leontodon saxatilis var. arenarius, also known as the Rock Hawksbit or Western Hawkbit, is a variety of perennial plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and broad, toothed leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon saxatilis var. arenarius are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
